title: Just a Ghost
description: A mod that adds, as it name suggests, just a ghost! Yep, that's about it.
body:
# Just a Ghost
![The mod’s title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b51699c734d82c1ed7f8ba35029ef93a65248715.png)

This mod adds, as the name suggest, just a ghost! Yes, that's really it! The Ghost is a new undead mob that spawns upon killing certain mobs such as Villages and Illagers. The mod also adds a new trade for Cleric Villagers to give some actual utility to the Ghost rather than just being a filler mob.
![Three ghosts in a Woodland Mansion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80df9781c3c5241ea69baacd8cb1dc74540effb0.png)

# Compatibility
This mod is compatible with the Guard Villagers mod! This means that when you kill a Guard Villager from that mod there's a chance that a Ghost can spawn too! The mod is coded so that any entity tagged as an illager will also have a chance to spawn a Ghost.

# QnA
- Will you port this mod to Fabric?
> Yeah, eventually.
- Will you port this mod to NeoForge?
> I mean I feel like I have to.
- Will you port this mod to older versions?
> Probably not.
- Will you port this mod to newer versions?
> Not for Forge, that's for sure.
- Why did you make this mod?
> Bored.
- What future plans do you have for the mod?
> Add other types of ghosts, like Banshees, Shades, etc.
